home.title: Building elegant web experiences
paragraphs: I design and develop refined digital systems that help brands show up with confidence, clarity, and a memorable sense of style.
We work with founders and executives managing complexity across entities, borders, and time zones.
home.projectsDescription: A starting point for the project archive, ready for real case-study images, metrics, and writeups.
home.servicesDescription: A focused structure for brand sites, portfolios, product pages, and digital experiences that need to feel considered.

projects.title: Maison Identity

projects.title: Editorial Platform
projects.description: A calm publishing experience with a custom content workflow.

projects.title: Studio Commerce

projects.title: RESULTS DELIVERED TO CLIENTS
projects.testimonialsSubheading1: We build long-term partnerships based on trust,

testimonials.quote: Eira has completely transformed how our family office manages cross-border assets and logistics. Their attention to detail is unmatched.
Having executive support that understands high-growth environments means I can focus entirely on scaling our product.
Discretion and speed are critical in VC. Eira's operations management is flawless, proactive, and completely reliable.

services.title: Executive Support Designed for Productivity
services.description: We manage the operational complexity of your business and personal life behind the scenes, allowing you to focus on high-impact leadership.

howWeWorkSteps.title: 01 — Discovery & Alignment
howWeWorkSteps.description: We analyze your current processes, identify communication overhead, and align on exact preferences and tool stacks.

howWeWorkSteps.title: 02 — Systems Optimization
howWeWorkSteps.description: We establish calendar guards, email workflows, and travel protocols tailored to your specific rhythm.

howWeWorkSteps.title: 03 — Active Management
howWeWorkSteps.description: We execute day-to-day operations with high precision, anticipating needs and shielding you from noise.

howWeWorkSteps.title: 04 — Refinement & Scale
howWeWorkSteps.description: We review outcomes, automate recurring tasks, and scale operations as your footprint grows.

coreServices.name: Inbox & Communication
coreServices.description: Triage email, draft correspondence, coordinate key communications, and act as a professional first line of defense.

coreServices.name: Calendar & Time Defense
coreServices.description: Strictly gate meetings, protect focus time, align calendars, and navigate cross-border scheduling conflicts.

coreServices.name: Logistics & Travel Planning
coreServices.description: Manage multi-stop travel, flight bookings, accommodation, ground transfers, and real-time itinerary updates.

coreServices.name: Special Project Support
coreServices.description: Research vendors, coordinate private events, construct management briefs, and handle custom operational requests.

about.title: Eira Executive Operations
paragraphs: Eira was founded on a simple premise: high-performing leaders should not be bogged down by operational details. We provide high-end, discreet executive operations support designed to free up intellectual capacity and drive leverage.

Our approach blends absolute discretion with rigorous attention to detail. We fit seamlessly into your existing tech stack and personal workflows, acting as a quiet shield and a force multiplier for your productivity.
about.caption: CEO AND FOUNDER OF EIRA EXECUTIVE OPERATIONS
about.discretionParagraph: We operate behind the scenes, ensuring your processes run smoothly while maintaining absolute confidentiality at all times.

whyChooseReasons.label: Discretion
whyChooseReasons.text: Absolute confidentiality in all personal and professional affairs.

whyChooseReasons.label: Precision
whyChooseReasons.text: Detail-oriented workflows that prevent errors before they happen.

whyChooseReasons.label: Adaptability
whyChooseReasons.text: Seamlessly fitting into your existing tech stack and routines.

contact.title: Tell us what you are building
contact.description: We work with a select group of clients to ensure dedicated, high-touch service. Reach out to discuss how we can support your operations.
